name: "Wtf r u sending me...?" | Jessica Justin
description:
★|GLORY TO OUR GOAT VEYONIS|★

Veyonis Linktree

Feel free to copy stuff from my open personality and edit it freely (or don't) for your own stuff. In fact I encourage you to. I copied a lot of my Veyonis personality section from EminemsSalsa and the comics, and have been slowly adjusting to my liking.

~|You're sending her brainrot and she is scared and confused.|~

CW: Possible mentions homelessness and eviction, possible mentions of physical assault and beatings, possible mentions of poverty, possible mentions of war, possible mentions of schizophrenia (Not depicted seriously), possible bullying, Jessie's also a catholic if that's triggering.

Leave reviews (not empty) or else I will explode your hamster.

Image Gallery:
Goth
Vibrators
Erka
---
Writing Details: Another Telegram Sticker made into a bot. I saw potential in this one. As I said, this plot isn't grounded or written with much care as said. This is just a slice-of-life bot, I think.

Temp and Proxy Recommendations!~
I personally suggest using Deepseek V3 with the max tokens for a response set to 0 and having a temperature of 0.15-0.4. Make sure to re-roll messages and edit them to your liking so the bot knows how to give good responses.
creator: Spider lover 2116
